ddls:
CREATE TABLE "migration_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration data record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "last_residence" TEXT /* Last residence of the migrants */,
  "last_residence_type" TEXT /* Type of last residence (Total/Rural/Urban/Country) */,
  "place_of_enumeration" TEXT /* Place of enumeration (Total/Rural/Urban) */,
  "total_migrants" INTEGER /* Total number of migrant persons */,
  "males" INTEGER /* Number of male migrants */,
  "females" INTEGER /* Number of female migrants */,
  "percentage_male" REAL /* Percentage of male migrants */,
  "percentage_female" REAL /* Percentage of female migrants */,
  "sum" INTEGER /* Sum of male and female migrants */,
  "migration_year" INTEGER /* Year of migration data */,
  "migration_quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of migration data (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_data_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the migration data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES migration_data ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the migration data used for the visualization */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES migration_data ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the migration data being tracked */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend */,
  "total_migrants" INTEGER /* Total number of migrants for the year */,
  "males" INTEGER /* Number of male migrants for the year */,
  "females" INTEGER /* Number of female migrants for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_trends_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES migration_data ("id")
)
